Engineering engagement, at depth.

We work with research institutions, advanced builders, and early technical organizations to design, build, and document systems that hold up over time.

System Integration & Architecture

We design and implement integration architectures for complex multi-component systems. Emphasis on stable interfaces, explicit data contracts, and documented integration points — built for maintainability from day one.

Scope: end-to-end system design spanning hardware, firmware, and software; interface definition and validation, embedded communication stacks (CAN, Ethernet, serial), sensor and actuator coordination, reliability engineering, and cyber-physical systems integration.

Technical Consulting

Early-stage architecture review, engineering process guidance, and technical decision support. Practical, direct, and documentation-backed. We work with teams making foundational choices about systems they will live with for years.

Scope: fractional CTO and technical leadership, architecture and design reviews, firmware and embedded software audits, technical due diligence, risk and requirements analysis, development process optimization.

Research & Development

We take on applied research and early-stage development work — from feasibility studies and proof-of-concept builds to algorithm development and instrumentation design. Our goal is to bridge the gap between exploratory work and production-ready engineered systems.

Scope: feasibility studies and proof-of-concept builds, controls and automation algorithm development, scientific instrumentation, open-source hardware and tooling, and transitioning research into engineered artifacts.

What to expect.

Every engagement starts with a structured scope — written constraints, defined interfaces, and explicit documentation of assumptions. We do not scope creep silently; changes are flagged and documented before implementation.

We deliver working systems with documentation that enables you to maintain, modify, and understand what was built — without ongoing dependency on us.

Engagements typically start with a short, paid discovery and scoping phase (1–2 weeks) to define interfaces, risks, and success criteria. Work then proceeds as fixed-scope milestones for defined deliverables, or as a monthly retainer for ongoing technical leadership and execution.

Have a systems problem?

We engage early and at depth. Bring us a constraint, an architecture question, or an underdefined problem — that is where we do our best work.
